title: Please make the Main table view saveable
excerpt: We have a number of folks on our team that don’t understand that the main table will never save their filters. It’s not user friendly. Of course once you know you can customize and save your view people do it, but for ne…

posts.author: kelleycorreia (Kelley Correia)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a number of folks on our team that don’t understand that the main table will never save their filters. It’s not user friendly. Of course once you know you can customize and save your view people do it, but for new users having the main view saveable would be a huge blessing and help alleviate new user frustration and early UNadoption - thank you!
PLEASE VOTE ON THIS ONE
